title: Connect workflow skills and handoffs
summary: Tighten the existing workflow skills so setup, help, review, initiate, and continue connect through explicit handoffs, live registry state, and enforceable JSON validation.
acceptance_criteria: workflow-foundry project state exists and validates
workflow help shows the connected command path
setup hands off to initiate for new projects and review for existing projects
initiate delegates missing project setup instead of inventing separate scaffold behavior
query helper can print a single project snapshot
validator fails tasks missing required context snapshot load paths

context_snapshot.summary: Load the workflow-foundry project plus root workflow surfaces before resuming this task.

session_log.event: Created initial workflow-foundry task at intake to track connection of the repo-local workflow skill system.
